data.title: DOGE prototype Shiba Inu KABOSU's owner announced that he has a new dog Kokoro
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The owner of DOGE prototype Shiba Inu KABOSU posted on the X platform announcing that he has adopted a new dog Kokoro.

data.title: Utah Bitcoin Reserve Bill Passes, But Doesn’t Include Strategic Reserve Component
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Utah's Bitcoin Reserve Act was passed, but it did not include the strategic reserve part. The bill includes basic protections for Bitcoin mining, running nodes, self-custody, etc. (Bitcoin News)

data.title: Sonic Labs co-founder AC: Once hit by Multicoin managing partner Kyle Samani, but now successful
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto KOL 0xDesigner posted on the X platform that he had a fierce dispute with Multicoin managing partner Kyle Samani, who almost hit him. In response, Sonic Labs co-founder Andre Cronje said: "The first and only time I showed a product to a venture capitalist was to Kyle Samani. After the call, he thought I would not be a good builder and should stop trying to be a founder. His words were heartbreaking and it took a while to recover. But now I have succeeded and the code I wrote has assumed important responsibilities in five unicorn projects, so don't worry too much about Kyle Samani, just build cool things."

data.title: Utah Passes Bitcoin Reserve Bill Without Strategic Reserve Clause
data.description: According to Odaily, the Utah Bitcoin Reserve Bill has been approved, although it does not include the strategic reserve section. The legislation provides fundamental protections for rights related to Bitcoin mining, operating nodes, and self-custody.

data.title: Key Security Tips For Using Multi-Signature Wallets
data.description:
According to PANews, SlowMist's Cosine shared insights on the X platform regarding the use of Safe multi-signature or other multi-signature wallets. Users are advised to consider the following points:

1. Ensure that all signature steps are verifiable. If a technically proficient friend struggles to verify them, it is prudent to be skeptical.

2. When using multi-signature wallets, it is beneficial to pair them with hardware wallets. This is especially true if the hardware wallet can effectively parse complex signatures and provide alerts for any signature anomalies.

The overarching security strategy is to never rely on a single party, as there is always a risk of a single point of failure. It is best to employ multiple verification methods.

data.title: Cosine: If you still use multi-signature wallets such as Safe, all signature steps must be verifiable and used with hardware wallets
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Slow Mist Yuxian posted on the X platform that if you are still using Safe multi-signature or other multi-signature (regardless of the technical mode), you need to pay attention to the following points: 
1. All signature steps must be verifiable. If you find a friend who is very knowledgeable about technology and can't verify it after a long time, you should be suspicious by default; 
2. Since multi-signature is used, if it can be used with a hardware wallet, especially one that can do a good job of complex signature parsing and abnormal signature risk reminder, it is best to use it together. 
The security idea is to never trust one party. There may always be a single point of risk. It is best to verify from multiple parties.

data.title: MELANIA 24-hour trading volume dropped to $2 million, only 1.4% of TRUMP
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa, the 24-hour trading volume of Trump's wife Melania's token MELANIA is only $2 million, while the market value of the meme coin is close to $800 million. In contrast, the 24-hour trading volume of the TRUMP token is as high as $147 million, and the trading volume of MELANIA is only 1.4% of TRUMP. As the "guillotine" node of this wave of Solana Meme market heat, it has finally been abandoned by retail investors.
